description: A grid of nine photographic panels showing various people at a podium or microphone interacting with a white dove. Each panel shows a different person — some speaking into the microphone, others holding or reacting to the white bird perching on their shoulders or hands. The backdrop is consistently an orange-brown curtain. The subjects wear varied casual and military-style clothing. Their expressions range from surprise to amusement to solemnity as they interact with the dove.
